ambient_description.chinese: 潮湿的空气中有水滴声回荡。
ambient_description.pinyin: Cháoshī de kōngqì zhōng yǒu shuǐdī shēng huídàng.
ambient_description.english: Water droplets echo in the damp air.

ambient_description.chinese: 树叶在微风中沙沙作响。
ambient_description.pinyin: Shùyè zài wēifēng zhōng shāshā zuò xiǎng.
ambient_description.english: Leaves rustle in the gentle breeze.

ambient_description.chinese: 远处传来滴水声和呻吟声。
ambient_description.pinyin: Yuǎnchù chuán lái dīshuǐ shēng hé shēnyín shēng.
ambient_description.english: Dripping water and moans echo in the distance.
